div.p: Use these short, ready-to-post MCP angles to spark curiosity, explain the value quickly, and introduce TrueProfit naturally.

img.style: width: 115%; max-width: 580px; height: auto; object-fit: contain; margin-left: auto; transform: translateX(30px); filter: drop-shadow(0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.04));

div.h2: 1. Why X/Twitter Works for MCP Promotion
div.p: X/Twitter is an exceptionally powerful channel for promoting TrueProfit's Model Context Protocol (MCP) because the feature is easy to frame as a short, curiosity-driven observation. The hooks that perform best do not need to explain the technical setup, integrations, or complex configurations. Instead, they only need to showcase the "aha!" moment where AI already understands the merchant's store data and provides immediate value.
When writing posts about TrueProfit MCP, keep these positioning rules in mind to maximize engagement and trust:

ul.li: Do not lead with "new feature": Audiences skip feature announcements. Lead with a relatable, real-world merchant problem instead.
Lead with the merchant problem: Focus on sleepless nights, discrepancies in profit numbers, or unexpected losses.
Frame MCP as the facilitator: Show MCP as the reason why the AI (Claude or ChatGPT) can answer complex questions using real, real-time store data.
Mention TrueProfit only after the value is clear: Build the story first, prove the value of the quick answer, and then introduce TrueProfit as the source of that data.
Keep the post casual: Write in a casual, observation-driven tone. It should feel like a real operator sharing a quick win, not an app pitch.

div.p: Use these copy templates directly or adapt them to match your personal brand. Each template includes a hook, a specific content angle, and copy blocks that you can copy to your clipboard in a single click.

div.h3: Hook #1: 2am, no app, still got my numbers.

div.div: Angle: Video shows the actual Claude conversation pulling store data. Text sets up the relatable moment first, video does the rest.

button.onclick: navigator.clipboard.writeText(this.closest('.copy-post-section').querySelector('.copy-post-box').innerText.trim()); const textNode = this.childNodes[this.childNodes.length - 1]; const orig = textNode.nodeValue; textNode.nodeValue = ' Copied!'; this.classList.add('copied'); setTimeout(() => { textNode.nodeValue = orig; this.classList.remove('copied'); }, 2000);

div.p: Couldn't sleep, started spiraling about whether this week was actually profitable or just high-revenue`
Typed into claude: "How's my store doing vs last week"
It just answered. real margin, ad efficiency, everything and pulled straight from TrueProfit
It took 30 seconds.
If you did not try TrueProfit, grab it here [your affiliate link]. Dont let your store data just sit in an app doing nothing, connect it to your AI and actually use it.
Material: [material video]

div.h3: Hook #2: Revenue looked fine. Something was still wrong.

div.div: Angle: Root cause. Hits the gap between revenue and real profit. Works as a standalone observation.

button.onclick: navigator.clipboard.writeText(this.closest('.copy-post-section').querySelector('.copy-post-box').innerText.trim()); const textNode = this.childNodes[this.childNodes.length - 1]; const orig = textNode.nodeValue; textNode.nodeValue = ' Copied!'; this.classList.add('copied'); setTimeout(() => { textNode.nodeValue = orig; this.classList.remove('copied'); }, 2000);

div.p: January: best revenue month ever
Also January: margin quietly dropped 8 points
Also January: found out because I asked my AI, not because my dashboard told me
Shipping cost miscalculation. ~$340 in avoidable losses. 30 seconds to find.
So Getting TrueProfit here [your affiliate link] and putting it to work with your AI. Your store data shouldn't just live in an app!!
Material: [material video]
To make your X/Twitter post as engaging and authentic as possible, we recommend preparing the following visual materials:

ul.li: Real video showcasing how the MCP feature works: Record a short, high-quality video clip of your screen while using Claude or ChatGPT to query TrueProfit data. This visual proof draws users in and drives home the ease of use.
Optional screenshot or screen recording: Capture clean screenshots of Claude / ChatGPT pulling real store metrics from TrueProfit, showing PnL, ad spend, and margins cleanly.
Your affiliate link: Make sure to copy your unique affiliate link from the dashboard setup page and place it naturally inside your post copy.

div.p: The strongest X/Twitter posts should feel like a real operator observation, not an app pitch. Start with the moment of surprise, show why the insight matters, then introduce TrueProfit MCP as the reason the AI can answer with real store data.
